headline: Walmart to remodel nine NH stores; add pharmacy in Keene
summary: Walmart plans to remodel nine stores in New Hampshire this year and open a new pharmacy in Keene, the company announced Thursday. The changes will expand its assortment of healthy foods, affordable on-trend items and enhance the in-store and online experience, according to a news release. The renovation will include upgrading layouts, technology and delivery in “as little as an hour for most ...

headline: Walmart to remodel over 650 stores, open about 20 new locations
summary: Walmart plans to remodel over 650 stores across the U.S. and open about 20 new locations in 2026 and early 2027 to improve customer convenience.

headline: Walmart Modernizes U.S. Stores As Omnichannel Investment Meets Fair Value Estimates
summary: Walmart (NasdaqGS:WMT) is launching what it describes as its largest U.S. store network modernization, covering more than 650 remodels and around 20 new store openings through 2027. The plan includes updated store layouts, new technology, and expanded pickup and delivery services that link in store and online shopping. This expansion focuses on both strengthening Walmart's physical presence and scaling its digital capabilities across the U.S. network. For you as an investor following...

headline: Grocers turn to AI pricing as inflation reshapes food shopping
summary: CNBC Food and Wellness Reporter Brandon Gomez reports grocers are using AI to cut food waste and target discounts, boosting sales and traffic as inflation drives consumers to seek deals.

headline: How AI is giving Kroger an edge in the grocery price wars and helping to curb food waste
summary: Grocery stores like Kroger are using AI to help find value for perishable food that would otherwise end up in the trash. The data being generated by Flashfood and companies like it are giving retailers insights into consumer behaviors like showing what products will sell, at what price and at what point in their shelf life. CNBC’s Brandon Gomez looks into this growing technology.
